abstract: An atom that describes a single panorama.
overview:
## Overview

A panorama sample atom has an atom type of `kQTVRPanoSampleDataAtomType` (`'pdat'`). It describes a single panorama, including track reference indexes of the scene and hot spot tracks and information about the default viewing angles and the source panoramic image.

The structure of a panorama sample atom is defined by the `QTVRPanoSampleAtom` data type:

The minimum and maximum values in the panorama sample atom describe the physical limits of the panoramic image. QuickTime VR allows you to set further constraints on what portion of the image a user can see by calling the `QTVRSetConstraints` routine. You can also preset image constraints by adding constraint atoms to the panorama sample atom container. The three constraint atom types are `kQTVRPanConstraintAtomType`, `kQTVRTiltConstraintAtomType`, and `kQTVRFOVConstraintAtomType`. Each of these atom types share a common structure defined by the `QTVRAngleRangeAtom` data type:

**Field descriptions**

items.description: The major version number of the file format.
items.name: majorVersion

items.description: The minor version number of the file format.
items.name: minorVersion

items.description: The index of the image track reference.
items.name: imageRefTrackIndex

items.description: The index of the hot spot track reference.
items.name: hotSpotRefTrackIndex

items.description: The minimum pan angle, in degrees.
items.name: minPan

items.description: The maximum pan angle, in degrees.
items.name: maxPan

items.description: The minimum tilt angle, in degrees.
items.name: minTilt

items.description: The maximum tilt angle, in degrees.
items.name: maxTilt

items.description: The minimum vertical field of view, in degrees.
items.name: minFieldOfView

items.description: The maximum vertical field of view, in degrees.
items.name: maxFieldOfView

items.description: The default pan angle, in degrees.
items.name: defaultPan

items.description: The default tilt angle, in degrees.
items.name: defaultTilt

items.description: The default vertical field of view, in degrees.
items.name: defaultFieldOfView

items.description: The width, in pixels, of the panorama stored in the highest resolution image track.
items.name: imageSizeX

items.description: The height, in pixels, of the panorama stored in the highest resolution image track.
items.name: imageSizeY

items.description: The number of frames into which the panoramic image is diced horizontally.
items.name: imageNumFramesX

items.description: The number of frames into which the panoramic image is diced vertically.
items.name: imageNumFramesY

items.description: The width, in pixels, of the panorama stored in the highest resolution hot spot image track.
items.name: hotSpotSizeX

items.description: The height, in pixels, of the panorama stored in the highest resolution hot spot image track.
items.name: hotSpotSizeY

items.description: The number of frames into which the panoramic image is diced horizontally for the hot spot image track.
items.name: hotSpotNumFramesX

items.description: The number of frames into which the panoramic image is diced vertically for the hot spot image track.
items.name: hotSpotNumFramesY

items.description: A set of panorama flags.
items.name: flags

items.description: An OSType describing the type of panorama.
items.name: panoType

items.description: Reserved.
items.name: reserved2

items.description: Store the panoramic image for a panoramic node.
items.name: Panorama image track

items.description: Store cylindrical panoramas with horizontal orientation.
items.name: Cylindrical panoramas

title: Panorama sample atom ('pdat')
